textByHash.012e8c8bc43ae7b379a0480d9dfe25b83686476c: Light boxes are a puzzle which contains a 5 by 5 grid of lights with some lights on and some lights off.
textByHash.07223eabe61d207edb308ab12c416114e352f353: This type of clue will show you a map of an area.
textByHash.08f181efaee58f52e5e3c7b84db2a697e96000e7: At this location you will need to perform an emote, as well as wear the items that you had to bring along.
textByHash.10cd7b2b30d807d69b4065049517097c018f0d69: You will see a couple of words that may or may not make sense together. You will have to rearrange the letter to make the name of the person you need to talk to.
textByHash.1824ac1cdb8a78bd88ac6bfd12d6722e841c82e9: Beginner clues are the lowest tier of clue scroll and as such only require a couple of steps to solve.
textByHash.1c8c0f12172bf942054d5c1720be7adf0a456bbe: Master clues can only be obtained as a rare chance when opening your casket or by handing in one of every type of clue, apart from beginner, to Watson who resides in Hosidius.
textByHash.248dae3cdb8a82f99db06a9b079430fefef38726: There are also challenges that will involve you gathering an item or crafting an item for a certain person.
textByHash.26dfc53e5961d3c5519b3ad02be5dfba2118d719: This map will show you where you will need to dig, or what you will need to search to get the next clue.
textByHash.2cbca93d75edf0f73cc31076e7ad2cebf12ad781: This type of clue will give you a location that you will need to visit, along with some items you will need.
textByHash.38a2a62bae946c12832d3c21bcd875acc31ad7d5: Some clues may have you wear nothing at all.
textByHash.4e180431bec4a88b8bef98b643cda3caef9626a8: There are many different puzzles that you can come across while doing clues. These range from light boxes to puzzle boxes.
textByHash.4ed1d92a1dfdecf652f89cf9823c15621f4f78c4: Depending on the tier of clue, you will need to obtain a strange device from either Reldo, located in Varrock, or Jorral, located south of Tree Gnome Stronghold.
textByHash.508ac8b058bd22a466a22166c0146ebb551bc907: After you find the place you need to dig, you may find a casket or another scroll.
textByHash.58002895de3bc55cb2266c9cffcf93ba6336b089: Advanced clues have tiers between easy and master.
textByHash.595965ff1457116588929d09235cdf628d0fb820: What can I do for you?
textByHash.596f7777d257048c03e8c162e1bfeecceb52b22f: This type of clue has you talk to someone around Gielinor. Although the clue does not tell you exactly who to talk to.
textByHash.60210c6210c4b96a7d502c3f48b0f0ca20a9a8c3: But the higher the tier of clue, the more steps you will have to do beforehand. An example of this would be needing to find a key before opening a chest.
textByHash.683643f8db60eed1469190891828036f4fc9fc79: Why did I not think of that before.
textByHash.6bedabacde4b1c91844144a1792327481c87c118: A cipher is a string of letters that have been scrambled using the shift cipher method.
textByHash.74543b1ca3cb6e226c7fe13294ce360c255a10e2: Very well, you'll now find clues from mining, fishing and woodcutting.
textByHash.8102409014b4077f0b548248984ba55659620686: This type of clue will have you use a sextant, chart and a watch to find out the place you will need to dig. This type of challenge only appears in clue tiers medium and above.
textByHash.875f410560054a09b72b6bd2149510713cc4fe9a: The puzzle will have you click the buttons below to turn on or off some of the lights with the end goal being, having all the lights turned on.
textByHash.8915c47f9c80e7c05d23ffdf368034e3c7742f7d: This type of clue has you talk to someone around Gielinor. Although the clue does not tell you exactly who to talk to. This type of challenge only appears in clue tiers medium, hard and elite.
textByHash.8918a1f7deac414f96b8accf4784a898214440a3: Vessel containers include mining geodes, fishing bottles and clue nests. Are you sure you want to start receiving them, again?
textByHash.89207fa3cb53db38440378ce97f065547bfa1dbc: But with more advanced tiers of clue, come better loot.
textByHash.89f772b804c4264766f1ee73aedeedbd6f0d393b: Vessel containers include mining geodes, fishing bottles and clue nests. Are you sure you want to stop receiving them?
textByHash.8b6757145f2512471ca26be36f9eaa6a87a167bb: This type of clue can be as simple as talk to the specified person or searching a crate in a specified location.
textByHash.8e5e83d3cc1c375d54e64d478bfdb99eb4d49b80: Beginner clues have also been known to be left in geodes while mining, as well as sometimes in bottles that you may fish up from time to time and from nests which fall out of trees.
textByHash.955b416879d47ad67863faeba9a6701dd318c670: This type of clue will show you which fairy ring code you will need to use to get to the right place to dig.
textByHash.9d98c93c50190348a82c3e2c538427dd8a15af43: Although this is a much rarer occurrence.
textByHash.a7445e910e89cb300869dfe9c1aa5ab639cdc3c0: The chance to get a higher tier clue from geodes, bottles and nests is lower the higher the tier. But if you chop down higher-level trees you will have a higher chance of receiving a nest which contains a clue. Same with fishing and mining.
textByHash.a9d6f9d4daa9c82860a375aaa0d1e718630ff715: Very well, you'll no longer find clues from mining, fishing and woodcutting.
textByHash.ae715cb1bf0f73cfd15da5310a55f0ba0d5f2869: This type of challenge only appears in clue tiers medium and above.
textByHash.aea2ddefbbd843d8d6da16d262a2e992b3772f28: So long and happy clue hunting!
textByHash.b1e43beabe61066960e376d406ddc2b0b078af87: Slaying monsters for a chance at a clue being dropped. I hear goblins are sneaky, maybe they have some clue scrolls on them ripe for the taking.
textByHash.b95dae4522696ea08df950b4ef183c932e408e98: You can gain advanced clues the same way you would get a beginner clue. But to get higher tier scrolls you will need to defeat more powerful foes.
textByHash.baf86ff9355806ef92680612a5aa0c288c0e24d6: You will then need to use this device to find the location you will need to dig.
textByHash.bc2d02033c9deec0a015251c3dc4c57d95b5754e: Beginner clues are gained through various activities. Those activities are as follows.
textByHash.bcc45eaa9d99a90ea66d7d51137dda4693c5e1f0: The only exception to this is master clue scrolls.
textByHash.c356d5626ed67474c82cbf584f0b231c5dfa5f96: This type of clue has you work out a logical problem for the person you need to talk to. This type of challenge only appears in clue tiers medium, hard and elite.
textByHash.c476f511288441e67b5c4776bd80027c448995ea: Unlike more advanced clues, you should not expect to get very valuable items from completing a beginner clue.
textByHash.ca978112f8d870d8dc51d7b747707ee2867a7bc7: You will then need to use the numbers to figure our where you will need to dig after arriving to your destination.
textByHash.cb87dcb03f91dc8dff9be874c1ef7fb63b822fec: Puzzle boxes are puzzles that will have you complete a slider puzzle that, when complete, will look like an image in game.
textByHash.dbf02c76628bf4b825f6b0e6bd1fdb7aa70f4fc1: Maybe someone left one in the cow field, who knows where you could obtain them.
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.e7eccf4457145fab7fb4edd65db047007abdc84b: An example of this would be ZCZL which, shifted forward by one, would be Adam.
textByHash.f2114fc8f524c890e22ce7aa3fc32444bdffb806: But please don't do that in public!
